candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears as a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of sales' alongside 'Other Cost of Production'; the amounts sum to the selected COGS total, so adding it separately would double count.
This is a broader amortization line not clearly tied specifically to the selected COGS bucket, and it is not preferable versus the explicit COGS-labelled D&A row.
This is a broad depreciation line below the operating expense detail and not clearly attributable specifically to the selected COGS bucket; the explicit COGS-labelled D&A row is better evidence.
This is a broad depreciation subtype not specifically linked to COGS and should not be added to COGS absent explicit allocation.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS' is visibly a child/component of that selected row, not a separate same-level operating line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Selling and marketing expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly SG&A-related D&A, but it appears as a component of the selected parent row 'Selling and marketing expenses' together with 'Other Selling and marketing expenses'; therefore it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket.

This is explicitly administrative D&A, but it appears as a component of the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses' together with 'Other Administrative expenses'; adding separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Research and development expenses
candidates.why: This is explicitly R&D D&A, but it appears as a component of the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses' together with 'Other Research & Development Expense'. Because 'Research and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this R&D D&A should not be added separately.

This would be a possible SG&A summary row, but it is blank in the excerpt and there is clearer evidence that the populated selling/admin/R&D D&A rows are subcomponents of already selected parent rows.
This is a broader amortization line not clearly mapped to the selected XSGA component rows and is less appropriate than the explicit SG&A-labelled D&A component lines.
This is a broad depreciation line and not clearly a separate same-level SG&A add-on relative to the selected XSGA component totals.
This is a broad depreciation subtype without explicit linkage to the selected SG&A component rows; adding it to XSGA would be speculative.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined set of 'Personnel expenses', 'Other external expenses', 'Selling and marketing expenses', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Research and development expenses'. The visible D&A rows for selling, administrative, and R&D are clearly nested components of those selected parent rows, so no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
